recommendations.title: Porn in the Hood
recommendations.overview: 3 childhood friends who have never left their hometown in the suburb try to get into porn as a way of earning easy money.

recommendations.title: Good Guys Go to Heaven, Bad Guys Go to Pattaya
recommendations.overview: Franky and Krimo dream of leaving the grey grime of their neighborhood behind and of traveling to the famous and diabolical Thai beach resort of Pattaya. To get there cheaply, the two friends have the crazy idea of registering, unbeknownst to him, th

recommendations.title: Taxi 5
recommendations.overview: A police officer who's transfered in the police of Marseille gets assigned to take down a group of Italian robbers who drive the powerfull Ferrari's with the older niece of Daniel, a terrible driver who gets the legendary white taxi.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: The Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: Two high school girls are best friends until one dates the other's older brother, who is totally his sister's nemesis.

recommendations.title: The Wages of Fear
recommendations.overview: When an explosion at an oil well threatens hundreds of lives, a crack team is called upon to make a deadly desert crossing with nitroglycerine in tow.

recommendations.title: Drug War
recommendations.overview: A drug cartel boss is arrested in a raid and coerced into betraying his former accomplices as part of an undercover operation.

recommendations.title: Maria
recommendations.overview: When a former BlackRose cartel assassin deliberately betrays them by refusing to complete her mission, the cartel orders her execution. Unbeknownst to them, she fakes her own death and is able to create a new life of her own. When the cartel discover

recommendations.title: Carjackers
recommendations.overview: By day, they're invisible—valets, hostesses, and bartenders at a luxury hotel. By night, they're the Carjackers, a crew of skilled drivers who track and rob wealthy clients on the road. As they plan their ultimate heist, the hotel director hires a ru

recommendations.title: I'm No Longer Here
recommendations.overview: In Monterrey, Mexico, a young street gang spends their days dancing to slowed-down cumbia and attending parties. After a mix-up with a local cartel, their leader is forced to migrate to the U.S. but quickly longs to return home.
recommendations.director: Luis Fernando Frías de la Parra
